name: suncloudsmoon
description: suncloudsmoon's Claude Code plugins — company personas, a soul-bearing codebase wiki, and a ChatGPT deep-research bridge.

plugins.name: company-replicator
plugins.description: Research a company and generate a cited persona skill bundle that makes Claude operate as that company.

plugins.name: stories
plugins.description: A soul-bearing wiki for your codebase — read the stories before non-trivial changes, rewrite them after.

plugins.name: chatgpt-deep-research
plugins.description: Bridge Claude and ChatGPT Deep Research: craft a self-contained prompt, then ingest the returned PDF report.
